3286010.name: CHRISTIAN QUEST: PATARA
3286010.description:
Enter the Arena of Spiritual Warfare.

You play the role of a Gladiator, once a convicted War Criminal, who is seeking freedom from his previous life. His journey has led him to discover his Faith in Christ and His Church, emboldened by the stories of the Orthodox Saints, and so the Gladiator's adventure begins.

Explore the ancient city of Patara as you uncover the real stories of the Saints who resided there. Help citizens in need, rescue children who have been separated from their families, perform good works and assist those around you so that they too, unhindered by the worries of their lives, can flourish in their spiritual growth.

Investigate your environment to uncover secrets, learn about the city and its inhabitants. Just by using the Look Action, you can the uncover the history of a structure -- or -- deduce the needs of another person.

Interact with anything you can reach to find its use. Whether it be lifting objects and animals, opening chests and doors, wielding a shovel, lighting a candle, or even offering incense to God, the Touch Action will be widely used on your Quest.

Converse with the citizens of Patara to learn more about them. Sometimes, they'll ask you for help, other times, you'll understand that they need help even if they don't ask. It's up to you to decide by using the Speak Action.

Use items that you obtain on your Quest to progress on the adventure. The Item Action will allow you to use what you've gathered from assisting those around you. Patara is not a city where you can take whatever you want, when you want it. You will have to use your logic and understanding in order to proceed.

With Prayer as your weapon, stand up and face the demons of your past. When you fall, get back up again, and attain freedom from the passions that plague your life. The Spiritual Warrior's battle will never be complete until his final breath.
3286010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
